summary: Executed V0.8 Readme Workflow Enrichment. Updated README.md and README_zh-CN.md to include a comprehensive, bilingual breakdown of all 17 built-in workflows and their exact trigger use-cases. Added a dedicated 'Custom Authoring & Collaborative Workflows' section providing concrete YAML examples (custom-deploy-pipeline) that explicitly demonstrates how to customize workflows for team collaboration by mixing deterministic bash scripts and is_isolated_reviewer AI nodes.
